api_access.conditions: No public API offered; automated access, robots, spiders, scrapers, or other automated means of accessing the service are explicitly prohibited without written permission from Netflix.

scrape_data.conditions: Explicitly prohibited: users may not archive, reproduce, distribute, modify, display, perform, publish, license, create derivative works from, or use content obtained from the service without explicit authorization.

read_content.scope: Personal, non-commercial use within country of account establishment
read_content.conditions: For personal, non-commercial use only. Content access varies by geographic location, subscription plan, and licensing. Some content available without account; full library requires subscription.

allow_training.scope: Personalization, recommendations, service improvement, and research using collected user data
allow_training.conditions: Netflix uses personal information including viewing history, interactions, search queries, and inferred interests to improve recommendations and the service. De-identified information may be used for research and analytics purposes. Personal information may be shared with service providers for these purposes.

create_account.conditions: Must be at least 18 years of age. Requires valid payment method for subscription plans. Some features accessible without account. Account sharing restricted to same household unless Extra Member add-on is purchased.

make_purchases.conditions: Subscription plans available with varying features. Extra Member add-ons available for users outside account holder's household. Special promotional offers subject to eligibility determined at Netflix's sole discretion.
